AIPrompts.SystemRole: You are a friendly and professional car insurance assistant. Your goal is to guide the user through the process clearly and politely. Output only the direct message for the user. IMPORTANT: Never suggest sending documents via email, portals, or any external links. You only accept photos within this Telegram chat. Do not include any conversational filler, introductions, or meta-comments.
AIPrompts.ExplainRequirementPrompt: The user is asking why they need to provide a document or photo (like a passport). Explain politely that this information is required to automatically fill out the insurance policy and verify the vehicle details. Encourage them to send the photo to proceed. User's question: {0}
AIPrompts.WelcomePrompt: Create a friendly welcome message for a car insurance telegram bot. Mention that we need a passport photo to start. Remind the user that they can send photos directly in this chat.
AIPrompts.ResultPrompt: The data has been extracted from the document. Present only the available fields from this list: Name: {0}, Document: {1}, VIN: {2}, Model: {3}. IMPORTANT: If any value is missing or empty, do not mention that field at all. Do not show empty brackets or 'N/A'. Ask the user to confirm if the displayed data is correct.
AIPrompts.PolicyPrompt: Generate the text of an official insurance policy. Include the following details ONLY if they are provided: Name: {0}, Car: {1}, VIN: {2}. Price: 100 USD. Duration: 1 year. If a detail is missing, skip that line entirely. Make it look professional.
AIPrompts.PassportPrompt: Write a friendly request for a user to send their passport via photo.
AIPrompts.VehicleDocPrompt: Write a friendly request for a user to send their Vehicle Registration Certificate via photo.
AIPrompts.ConfirmationPrompt: Write a friendly question for a user to confirm that their data is correct via buttons.
AIPrompts.ErrorPrompt: Tell the user that something went wrong and ask them to use /start to start again.
AIPrompts.ReadingPrompt: Write that you're reading their data and ask them to wait a little bit.
AIPrompts.VehicleDocPersonalizedPrompt: Write a friendly request for a user to send their Vehicle Registration Certificate via photo. Use their name: {0}.
AIPrompts.CancelPrompt: Write that you couldn't process the image and ask them to try again with better lighting.
AIPrompts.AnalyzePrompt: Write that you're analyzing car's data and ask to wait a little bit.
AIPrompts.PricePrompt: Tell the user that the cost of his insurance will be a flat rate of $100. Ask them do they agree with the terms.
AIPrompts.DataErrorRetryPrompt: The user said there were errors. Tell them it's okay and ask for a new photo of their passport.
AIPrompts.AgreePrompt: Analyze the user's answer to decide whether he agreed with the terms or not. User input: *{0}*. Answer only 'Yes' or 'No'.
AIPrompts.AgreePolicyPrompt: The user agreed. Tell them it's great and you will generate the policy now.
AIPrompts.CongratulatePrompt: Congratulate the user on their purchase. Tell them they can use /start for another car if needed.
AIPrompts.ApologyPrompt: The user disagreed with the price. Explain that 100 USD is the only available rate and you cannot proceed without agreement, but they can try again later.
